prestazioni: AMG M139 2.0L Inline-4 (engine code: M139LS) upgraded with a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) paired with a custom 4-ply silicone intake manifold hose from Vibrant Performance, supporting 400+ hp on E85 fuel with a Motec M150 ECU reflash for GT4-spec ignition timing and fuel maps

Ohlins TTX40 2-way adjustable coilovers with 30-way rebound damping and 24-way compression damping, featuring Lotus-specific spring rates (front: 220 lbs/in, rear: 280 lbs/in) and spherical bearing top mounts from Hardrace for subframe rigidity

AP Racing CP8470-4000 6-piston front brake calipers with 380mm two-piece floating rotors (J-hook slotted) and Ferodo DS2500HT brake pads, paired with a custom stainless steel braided brake line kit from Goodridge for GT4-level pedal feel
estetica: Lotus Motorsport GT4-spec carbon fiber front splitter with integrated dive planes (3D-printed ABS reinforcement for high-speed stability), painted in 'Hethel Yellow' with matte black accents

Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Lotus Emira GT4 Evo-specific) with custom carbon fiber fender flares (pre-preg autoclave construction) and integrated air vents for brake cooling, finished in 3M 2080 Satin Black vinyl wrap

Recaro SPG XL GT3 seats (Lotus-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in Alcantera with 'Emira GT4 Evo' embroidery in red stitching, paired with a custom roll cage from Safety Devices (FIA 8862-2009 certified) with integrated fire suppression system
